summary: Uniqlo achieved a F (19.0/100) due to their explicit performance across our three pillars. In Planet, they fall behind with 25.0/100 due to a severe lack of verifiable environmental or material transparency commitments. In People, they score a concerning 10.0/100, indicating severe gaps in verified supplier audits or significant government red flags (OSHA/CBP violations). Finally, in Animals, they score 25.0/100 because of an absence of strict public animal welfare commitments or certified raw material tracking.
